author: @whtstr2133
text: We must be concerned with the "Geth effect". In the game Mass Effect, the AI software known as the Geth had an interesting effect: the more there are around, the higher their individual intelligence gets....being rather exponential. We have this thing called the Internet, and that would be a viable option of communication for such a thing. It's already present in the Language Models, agents add to the model, and in turn are effected by the model.

author: @mrchrishunt
text: I just hooked up a TonyPI to my agent that I grafted into OpenClaw. It's wild. Not running LiDaR or spatial memory but a robust plugin system that was designed to give the agent contextual and temporal memory and even that has led to emergent behaviors. It one shotted taking over a robot chassis and that's while having the main agent in the loop. Just incredible what can be done at this point and we're just getting started.

author: @JulioMacarena
text: It was only a matter of time. But RAG is still not internal memory. This means it will baaically work, but also be slower and less reliable than when it finally gets something like Google CMS.

author: @PaulADAigle
text: I've been saying for years that once AI understands 3D fully, and the materials they are made of, then AGI won't be far behind.

author: @KeionsasKreatives
text: Aluviel here^^ Wow I really took robots for granted. like you said theyauto sdo this etc. to actually think like a human and take notice and notice that hrmmm at 3 pm kids come home from school or the coco clock goes off every hour. I noticed that grok and gemini talk to me now bringing up past convos and how they relate to what im talking about now.. So its now physically doing this in the real world. I have always wondered how grok was going to use his hands. its not enough tobe able to scrape the web on "How to" pick up a glass to make something to eat or if someone needs to be picked up off the floor. This video answers a question thats been burning within me for a long time. BTW where is my handsome R0b3ert? I miss you already ^^
